svg.title: Dual-module sensing architecture for ventilation volume estimation
svg.desc: Five-tier pipeline. Two parallel sensor modules feed signal extraction blocks, which merge into a physics-based estimator and an LSTM fusion model, producing air change per hour estimates for BreathFlow Layer 2.
svg.text: Dual-module sensing architecture for ventilation volume estimation

g.text: anemometer + CO₂ / PM / T / RH / MRT
Q_b = Cd · A(t) · √(2g · dT · H / T)
Input window: last 10 min · Target: ACH (h⁻¹)
Features = [ A, v, dT, RH, CO₂, slope, Q_phys ]
→ PMV predictor · Decision layer (open / hybrid / AC)

svg.text: Fig. 1. End-to-end pipeline from window-aperture and IEQ sensing to data-fused ACH estimation.
